name: scholarly-research-book
description: Agent Skills plugin for rigorous research nonfiction and research book writing: research intent routing, source discovery, source notes, extraction tables, literature review, argument architecture, chapters, claim traceability, citations, release audits, and proposal support.

interface.shortDescription: Research intent routing plus source, argument, citation, release, and proposal workflows for scholarly nonfiction.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin with focused Agent Skills for planning, researching, drafting, auditing, and revising scholarly nonfiction or a research book. Includes lightweight research-intent routing, staged architecture docs, a mode registry, book artifact contracts, source discovery, source notes, extraction tables, literature review mapping, claim-evidence ledgers, claim traceability, counterargument review, citation integrity checks, release audits, comp verification, and book proposal support.
defaultPrompt: Use research-intent-router to classify this research request, choose the smallest useful skill route, and decide whether deep source lookup is needed.
Use research-intent-router in deep mode to route this research request and attempt source lookup with verification limits.
Use Research Book Skills to turn my book idea into a staged research and writing plan.
Use annotation-to-source-note to turn my highlights into source-bound notes with locator gaps marked.
Use extraction-table-builder to build a source matrix before synthesis.
Use rights-privacy-release-auditor to check this packet before external sharing.
Audit this chapter with the claim-evidence ledger and citation-integrity auditor.
Map this literature into schools of thought, debates, gaps, and a chapter strategy.
Create JSON book artifacts that follow the book artifact contract.
